title: Docker Desktop MCP Catalog Distribution
description: Containerize Jarvy's MCP server and submit it to Docker Desktop's MCP catalog, enabling one-click installation for developers using Claude Desktop, Cursor, and other MCP clients
acceptance_criteria: Dockerfile.mcp builds successfully with multi-stage Alpine build
MCP initialize handshake works via stdio
tools/call works for all 6 MCP tools
mcp/server.yaml validates with Docker registry tools
Docker Desktop MCP Toolkit can enable Jarvy
GitHub Actions workflow auto-creates registry PRs on release

tasks.title: Create Dockerfile.mcp
tasks.description: Create multi-stage Dockerfile for MCP server container
subtasks: Implement cargo dependency caching with BuildKit cache mounts
Build jarvy binary with release profile
Add tini for proper signal handling
Add OCI labels for image metadata
Set ENTRYPOINT with tini and jarvy mcp

tasks.title: Implement container-aware host detection
tasks.description: Modify MCP server to detect running in container and handle host interaction
subtasks: Modify tool detection for container context
Return installation commands as strings (not execute directly)
Update jarvy_platform_info to indicate container mode

tasks.title: Test local container build
tasks.description: Verify Docker build and basic MCP communication
subtasks: Build image: docker build -f Dockerfile.mcp -t jarvy-mcp:local .

tasks.title: Create mcp/server.yaml manifest
tasks.description: Create Docker MCP Registry server manifest
subtasks: Add tags: devtools, installation, package-manager, cross-platform
Write about section with title, description, icon
Define source with project URL and dockerfile path
Add config section with environment variables
Define parameters for Docker Desktop UI

tasks.title: Create mcp/tools.json definitions
tasks.description: Create MCP tool definitions for Docker registry
subtasks: Validate JSON syntax matches MCP protocol spec

tasks.title: Create mcp/readme.md documentation
tasks.description: Write MCP-specific documentation for Docker catalog
subtasks: Add Docker Desktop quick start instructions
Add manual Claude Desktop configuration example
Document all 6 MCP tools with examples
Add security section (dry-run, confirmation, rate limiting)

tasks.title: Create Jarvy icon asset
tasks.description: Create icon for Docker MCP catalog listing
subtasks: Ensure transparent background works on dark/light themes

tasks.title: Validate with Docker MCP registry tools
tasks.description: Use Docker's validation tools to verify metadata

tasks.title: Test with Docker Desktop MCP Toolkit
tasks.description: Test end-to-end with Docker Desktop integration
subtasks: Generate local catalog: task catalog -- jarvy
Import to Docker Desktop: docker mcp catalog import
Enable Jarvy in MCP Toolkit UI
Test with Claude Desktop connected to Docker MCP
Verify audit logging works in container

tasks.title: Fork and configure docker/mcp-registry
tasks.description: Prepare repository fork for PR submission

tasks.title: Submit PR to docker/mcp-registry
tasks.description: Submit pull request for catalog inclusion
subtasks: Include testing evidence in PR description
Link to Jarvy repository and documentation
Respond to Docker team review feedback

tasks.title: Create GitHub Actions workflow for registry updates
tasks.description: Automate registry PR creation on new releases
subtasks: Create workflow triggered on release publish
Extract version and commit from release
Update server.yaml with new commit reference

tasks.title: Update main documentation
tasks.description: Add Docker MCP distribution to project docs
subtasks: Add Docker Desktop installation section to README
Link to Docker Hub MCP catalog page

tasks.title: Write integration tests for containerized MCP
tasks.description: Add tests for Docker container MCP functionality
subtasks: Test MCP protocol compliance in container
Test all tool handlers return valid responses
Test rate limiting works in container

implementation_notes.dockerfile_location: Root of repository as Dockerfile.mcp (per Docker MCP registry convention)
implementation_notes.metadata_location: mcp/ directory for server.yaml, tools.json, readme.md
implementation_notes.icon_requirements: 256x256 PNG, works on dark and light backgrounds
implementation_notes.host_integration: Container returns install commands as strings; MCP client executes on host
implementation_notes.testing_approach: Use MCP Inspector for protocol testing, Docker Desktop for integration testing

non_goals: Hosting our own Docker images (Docker builds and hosts as mcp/jarvy)
SSE/HTTP transport (stdio only for Docker MCP catalog)
Installing tools inside the container (tools install on the host)
Remote server deployment (local containerized server only)

risks.mitigation: Follow contributing guide exactly, test thoroughly with their validation tools

risks.description: Host tool detection fails in container
risks.mitigation: Return commands as strings, let MCP client handle execution on host
Multi-stage build, Alpine base, strip debug symbols, minimal dependencies
Pin to stable version (2024-11-05), monitor spec updates

risks.description: Slow PR review from Docker team
risks.mitigation: Submit early, provide thorough documentation and test evidence
